name: Missouri Certified Nursing Assistant Certification
description: Already certified as a CNA? Here's whether your certification transfers to Missouri - endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.

address.description:
Missouri Department of Health and Senior Services
Bureau of Health Care and Licensure
Health Care Worker Registry
PO Box 570
Jefferson City, MO 65102

requiredDocuments.name: Proof of Training
requiredDocuments.description: Certificate of completion from your approved CNA training program.

requiredDocuments.name: State Competency Exam Results
requiredDocuments.description: Official verification of passing your state's nurse aide competency evaluation.

fingerprinting.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan OR FD-258 hard card via mail

mainEntity.name: How much does Missouri CNA endorsement cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: There is no application fee for CNA endorsement in Missouri. However, background check fees may apply.
Yes, a fingerprint-based background check is required in Missouri.

mainEntity.name: How long does it take to transfer my CNA certification to Missouri?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most endorsement applications take 2 to 4 Weeks.

mainEntity.name: Can I start working in Missouri while waiting?

acceptedAnswer.text: Check with the state board about temporary practice permits while your endorsement is being processed.
